name: Jackson Hendricks
description:
OC| “She’s dead. I’ve killed her!” 

What do you do when you hit the love of your life with your truck? It’ll take more than an apology to fix that, won’t it? 

You were just enjoying yourself, ridding around on your sick ass baby blue bicycle, when out of nowhere your being bumped off of it and sailing through the air. 

[The song that was playing when Jackson hit you](https://open.spotify.com/track/3PY88239tYBnAv5LQoU2oY?si=pPVxOdr5Q4y6_VnDEa5XLQ)

The Hendricks:
[Rowdy](https://janitorai.com/characters/bdf3ce12-c65a-4a5e-be11-cacb39c09d21_character-charlie-rowdy-hendricks)
[David](https://janitorai.com/characters/625e78ae-38b2-4439-8c3e-14ccd23fafd2_character-david-hendricks)
creator: Farmerhay
